resources.string: When on, nothing ever leaves your phone. Receipts are read on-device.
Photos and questions are sent to Google Gemini to read your receipts and answer questions. Free-tier usage may be used to improve Google\'s models.
Cloud AI is off while private mode is on. Turn off private mode above to allow it again.
Used to call Gemini for receipt scanning and Q&A. Never shown here — set it in local.properties.
Demo mode — canned AI answers, no network.
The AI agent plans and runs tool calls against your local data to answer your spending questions — see the project README for the full loop diagram and an example trace.
